ananke 0.0.0.9000

Median

Source: R/AllGenerics.R, R/statistics.R
median.Rd

Median

Usage

# S4 method for CalibratedAges
median(x, na.rm = FALSE, ..., calendar = getOption("ananke.calendar"))

Arguments

x

A CalibratedAges object.

na.rm

A logical scalar: should NA values be stripped before the computation proceeds?

...

Currently not used.

calendar

A TimeScale object specifying the target calendar (see calendar()).

See also

Other statistics: interval_hdr(), mean()

Author

N. Frerebeau

Examples

## Calibrate a single date
cal <- c14_calibrate(300, 20)

## Statistics
median(cal)
#>   X1 
#> 1556 
mean(cal)
#>       X1 
#> 1570.327 

## Plot
plot(cal, panel.first = graphics::grid())
#> Error in (function (classes, fdef, mtable) {    methods <- .findInheritedMethods(classes, fdef, mtable)    if (length(methods) == 1L)         return(methods[[1L]])    else if (length(methods) == 0L) {        cnames <- paste0("\"", vapply(classes, as.character,             ""), "\"", collapse = ", ")        stop(gettextf("unable to find an inherited method for function %s for signature %s",             sQuote(fdef@generic), sQuote(cnames)), domain = NA)    }    else stop("Internal error in finding inherited methods; didn't return a unique method",         domain = NA)})(list("numeric"), new("standardGeneric", .Data = function (x,     ...) standardGeneric("axis_year"), generic = structure("axis_year", package = "aion"),     package = "aion", group = list(), valueClass = character(0),     signature = "x", default = NULL, skeleton = (function (x,         ...)     stop(gettextf("invalid call in method dispatch to '%s' (no default method)",         "axis_year"), domain = NA))(x, ...)), <environment>): unable to find an inherited method for function ‘axis_year’ for signature ‘"numeric"’

## Need to set 'calendar' to NULL
abline(v = median(cal, calendar = NULL), lty = 2, col = "blue")
abline(v = mean(cal, calendar = NULL), lty = 2, col = "red")

On this page

ananke is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.
